name: Grilled Garden Pizza
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Quick oats or old-fashioned oats
1/4 cup Chopped fresh basil or 2 cloves of garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first four ingredients; let stand for 10 minutes or until foamy.
2. In a mixer bowl, combine flour and uncooked oats. Gradually add the yeast mixture on low speed of an electric mixer; mix for an additional 2 minutes. (Dough will be soft.)
3. Knead on a floured surface 5 times. Place in a medium bowl sprayed with no-stick cooking spray, turning once to coat. Cover and let rise in a warm place for 30 minutes or until almost doubled.
4. Punch dough down; divide into 4 portions.
5. On a floured surface, pat each portion into a 6-inch circle.
6. Grill over medium hot coals for 2 to 4 minutes or until the bottom is golden brown. Remove from grill.
7. On the bottom side, layer the remaining ingredients in the order listed. Return to grill. Cover and cook for 4 to 6 minutes or until the bottom is golden brown and cheese begins to melt.
8. To bake in the oven: Heat the oven to 425 degrees. Spray a cookie sheet with no-stick cooking spray or oil lightly. Pat each portion of dough into a 6-inch circle onto the prepared sheet. Layer with Romano, half of mozzarella, bell pepper, onion, basil/garlic, and tomatoes. Bake for 25 minutes or until crust is golden brown. Sprinkle immediately with remaining cheese.
